allow: Bash(cmd /c "for /f ""tokens=5"" %a in \(''netstat -aon ^| findstr :3000 ^| findstr LISTENING''\) do taskkill /PID %a /F")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select OwningProcess; Get-Process node | Select Id, CPU")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Id, CPU, CommandLine")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_OwningProcess -Force }")
